About Me

Developer in
the making.

I'm Suryansh Tamrakar, a Computer Science student from Bhopal with a genuine passion for software development. I started with Java fundamentals, built a Student Management System with JDBC + MySQL, and now I'm levelling up fast — building full-stack web apps and exploring AI tools.

My biggest ongoing project is EduConnect — a React + Vite platform built to bridge the gap between students and educators. It's live, it's real, and it's growing. I believe in learning by building, not just studying.

Projects

Things I've built

Real code, real problems solved. Every project taught me something new.

🔨 In Progress
01 / MAJOR PROJECT
EduConnect Platform
A full-stack education platform connecting students and teachers. Built with React + Vite (frontend) deployed live on Vercel. Features course discovery, teacher profiles, student dashboards, and real-time engagement tools.

Planned additions: Spring Boot backend API, user auth with JWT, course enrollment system, AI-powered course recommendations, admin dashboard, and mobile-responsive redesign.
ReactViteJavaScriptCSSVercel
Live at educonnect-app-ztt8.vercel.app
↗ ⌥
Java
02 / PROJECT
Student Management System
My first real Java project — a console-based Student Management System using JDBC and MySQL. Full CRUD operations: add students, view records, manage data. This is where the Java + database journey really began. Clean OOP design with proper connection handling.
JavaJDBCMySQL
CRUD operations · OOP architecture
⌥
Java DSA
03 / ONGOING
DSA Journey
My public daily DSA practice log in Java. Arrays, strings, sorting, searching, recursion, and beyond. Consistent practice — building the algorithmic foundation needed for top-tier dev roles.

Coming Soon
04 / NEXT BUILD
EduConnect Backend API
Spring Boot REST API backend for EduConnect. Planned: JWT auth, course management endpoints, teacher-student matching, role-based access, MySQL database, deployed on AWS/Railway.
Spring BootJWTMySQLREST API

05 / AI PROJECT
AI Study Assistant
Planning an AI-powered study assistant using OpenAI/Claude API — integrated into EduConnect to help students get instant answers, summarize notes, and generate practice questions.
